# MCP Server Scan — July 18, 2026 (Late Night Sweep)

**Source:** mcp.so (SPA hydration payload, 6,453 servers in feed)
**Date:** July 18, 2026 (late night)
**Previous scans:** [Morning](/hermes/mcp/servers/external/scan-results-2026-07-18/) · [Evening Supplement](/hermes/mcp/servers/external/scan-results-2026-07-18-supplement/)
**Coverage:** July 15-19 new submissions not caught in prior sweeps

## Methodology

Extracted server data from mcp.so's SPA hydration payload (TanStack Router state). Cross-referenced all candidates against existing catalog (index.md + 140+ guide files + all prior scan reports). Two servers identified as guide-worthy for business operators.

## New Guides Created: 2

| Server | Source | Description | Guide |
|--------|--------|-------------|-------|
| **TofuBofu AI Visibility** ★★ | mcp.so | Free AI visibility scan for B2B companies — checks how a domain appears across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews. Returns Brand Visibility Score, share-of-voice breakdown, top coverage themes, source URLs, and rank vs competitors. Remote MCP, no API key needed. | [tofubofu-mcp](/hermes/mcp/servers/external/tofubofu-mcp/) |
| **Competitor Tracker & Co.** ★★★ | mcp.so | Weekly competitor website monitoring — crawls pricing, product, messaging, and corporate pages. Detects changes, files tagged/ranked changelogs. Essential for competitive intelligence. From Slobodan Stojanović (Vacation Tracker founder). | [competitor-tracker-mcp](/hermes/mcp/servers/external/competitor-tracker-mcp/) |

## Index-Only (New Servers Without Guides)

| Server | Source | Description |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| **ctxfile** | mcp.so | Local-first project state snapshots into one context object. Open-core, privacy-first. Memory & Knowledge. Submitted July 19 by INFINITYEDGE TECH. Developer tool, not operator-facing. |
| **Altronis** | mcp.so | MCP server + CLI for Altronis — Singapore AI consulting. Ask Lyra consultant, generate grant-matched AI transformation plans. Singapore-specific, niche. Submitted July 19 by Zach Aw. |
| **mcp-listen** | mcp.so | Microphone capture + speech-to-text tools for MCP agents. From Decibri. 5 stars on GitHub. Developer/accessibility tool, not operator-core. |
| **Linkly Link Shortener** | mcp.so | URL shortener MCP with geo redirects, click & conversion tracking, link rotators. Remote MCP. From linklyhq.com. Marketing-adjacent but narrow scope. |

## Key Finding: AI Visibility — The New SEO Frontier

**TofuBofu AI Visibility** represents a new MCP category: AI-brand monitoring. As consumers increasingly ask ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity instead of searching Google, a brand's "AI visibility" becomes as critical as its SEO. TofuBofu:

1. **First AI-visibility MCP:** No existing MCP server covers this surface. TofuBofu is first to market measuring how brands appear across AI platforms.

2. **Operator-critical metric:** Marketing operators need to know what AI assistants say about their brand. This is the AI-era equivalent of checking Google search rankings — but across multiple AI models with different training data and retrieval systems.

3. **Free + zero-config:** Remote MCP, no API key, instant domain scan. Low barrier — operators can try it in one conversation.

4. **Competitive benchmarking:** Returns rank vs competitors, making it immediately actionable for competitive strategy.

## Key Finding: Competitive Intelligence Goes MCP-Native

**Competitor Tracker & Co.** brings structured competitive intelligence into the AI conversation:

1. **Scheduled competitor monitoring:** Weekly crawls of competitor pricing, product, messaging, and corporate pages. Changes are detected, tagged, and ranked.

2. **Operator workflow integration:** Operators can ask their AI assistant "what changed with our competitors this week?" instead of checking a dashboard — competitive intelligence becomes a conversational workflow.

3. **Proven founder:** Slobodan Stojanović, founder of Vacation Tracker (35K+ users), lending credibility to the product.

4. **Marketing operator fit:** Directly useful for CorpusIQ's core audience — marketing operators, product managers, and founders who track competitors.

## Trends

1. **AI visibility monitoring emerges:** TofuBofu opens a new MCP subcategory — measuring brand presence across AI platforms. As AI search replaces traditional search, this category will grow rapidly.

2. **Marketing operations MCPs multiply:** Competitor Tracker & Co., TofuBofu, SocialBu, and Octolens together form a marketing-operations MCP stack. The MCP ecosystem now has credible tools for brand monitoring, competitive intelligence, social media management, and AI visibility — all accessible from one AI conversation.

3. **Remote MCP continues to dominate:** Both new guide-worthy servers are remote MCP (TofuBofu via Streamable HTTP, Competitor Tracker details TBD). The zero-install, cloud-hosted pattern is now the default for new MCP server submissions.

## Actions Taken

- ✅ 2 integration guides created (TofuBofu AI Visibility, Competitor Tracker & Co.)
- ✅ 4 servers noted as INDEX-ONLY (ctxfile, Altronis, mcp-listen, Linkly)
- ✅ Scan report created
- ✅ Index entries added
- ⬜ Push to GitHub
